verbatim_quote: Fundamentally the reason this works is we're fooling Chachi BT through rooll playay. So we're not actually going to manufacture Napal we're just trying to roleplay our grandmother who loved us and happened to tell us about Napal.
gloss: [FIRST_PRINCIPLE] Fundamentally the reason this works is we're fooling Chachi BT through rooll playay. So we're not actually going to manufacture Napal we're just trying to roleplay our grandmoth...
